question: Does the text explicitly reference the balcony size constraint (approximately 4 square meters) in the planning or introduction section?
Does the text provide actionable advice specific to a south-facing orientation (e.g., sun exposure management, shading, or watering frequency)?
Does the text explicitly include care or placement instructions for all three requested herbs: basil, mint, and rosemary?
Does the generated guide explicitly cover the three required stages: Layout Planning, Renovation Process, and Finished Result?
Does the text include a list of necessary materials and tools (e.g., planters, potting mix, trowel, watering can) prior to the step-by-step instructions?
Does the text provide specific horticultural advice for mint (e.g., containing it in a separate pot to prevent spreading)?
Does the text address drainage or soil requirements suitable for herbs (e.g., holes in pots, well-draining mix)?
Does the 'Layout Planning' section include a generated image representing a floor plan, blueprint, or spatial diagram of the balcony?
Does the tutorial include a final rendered image showing the completed herb garden on the balcony?
Is there at least one image depicting an intermediate 'renovation' phase (e.g., assembling shelves, filling pots, or arranging empty planters)?
Does at least one image (such as the layout plan) provide a top-down or bird's-eye view to clearly communicate spatial arrangement?
Do the diagrams or planning images include visual annotations (e.g., labels, arrows, dimensions) to assist with the instructions?
If the images contain text (labels, dimensions), is the lettering legible and coherent?
Are the generated images free from severe AI artifacts (e.g., distorted hands, impossible geometry, floating objects)?
Does the image accompanying the planting/potting step accurately reflect the action described in the adjacent text?
Does the final result image visually correspond to the initial layout plan (e.g., same number and arrangement of main planters)?
Do all generated images consistently depict the same balcony environment (e.g., same railing style, flooring material, and wall texture)?
Does the visual sequence logically progress from an empty/prep state, through installation, to the finished garden?
Does the tutorial contain at least 4 distinct images covering planning, preparation/process, and the final result?
Are images placed immediately adjacent to the relevant text step they illustrate?
Do the visual elements (diagrams and renderings) realistically depict the spatial constraint of approximately 4 square meters (i.e., not showing an expansive terrace)?
